instructions.instruction: Use this skill before writing ANY security-sensitive code.
instructions.original_snippets: Use this skill before writing ANY security-sensitive code.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger security-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Sensitive data in logs** — passwords, tokens, API keys, and PII must never appear in logs → [Sensitive Data in Logs](#sensitive-data-in-logs)
instructions.original_snippets: **Sensitive data in logs** — passwords, tokens, API keys, and PII must never appear in logs → [Sensitive Data in Logs](#sensitive-data-in-logs)
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger security-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Sobelow in CI** — `mix sobelow` must pass in CI; fail on any HIGH or CRITICAL finding
instructions.original_snippets: **Sobelow in CI** — `mix sobelow` must pass in CI; fail on any HIGH or CRITICAL finding
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger security-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Identify attack surface** — list all user inputs, external data sources, and network boundaries
instructions.original_snippets: **Identify attack surface** — list all user inputs, external data sources, and network boundaries
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger security-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Run `mix sobelow --router MyAppWeb.Router`** — static analysis on your router and controllers
instructions.original_snippets: **Run `mix sobelow --router MyAppWeb.Router`** — static analysis on your router and controllers
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger security-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Run `mix sobelow --private`** — check private functions for vulnerabilities
instructions.original_snippets: **Run `mix sobelow --private`** — check private functions for vulnerabilities
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger security-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Review findings by severity** — HIGH severity first, then MEDIUM, then LOW
instructions.original_snippets: **Review findings by severity** — HIGH severity first, then MEDIUM, then LOW
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger security-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Run full audit** — `mix deps.audit && mix hex.audit && mix sobelow` before merging
instructions.original_snippets: **Run full audit** — `mix deps.audit && mix hex.audit && mix sobelow` before merging
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger security-essentials.

instructions.instruction: **Interpretation:** Any Sobelow finding of HIGH or CRITICAL severity MUST be fixed before merging. LOW findings should be tracked and addressed within 2 sprints.
instructions.original_snippets: **Interpretation:** Any Sobelow finding of HIGH or CRITICAL severity MUST be fixed before merging. LOW findings should be tracked and addressed within 2 sprints.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger security-essentials.

instructions.instruction: Never disable Phoenix's built-in CSRF protection.
instructions.original_snippets: Never disable Phoenix's built-in CSRF protection.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger security-essentials.
